MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-22-2017 Continued To Feb-22-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT UNDER CAL. CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 426.16 (ANI-SLAPP).

The motion is continued to February 22, 2018 pursuant to the parties' stipulation. Opposition to be filed and served at least 15 court days before the hearing and reply to be filed and served at least 5 court days prior to the hearing.

Judge: Andrew Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR #5525, vgross@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AC)
